title: catalpa × galleana
intro: Catalpa × galleana is a hybrid plant derived from the cross between Catalpa bignonioides and Catalpa ovata. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Catalpa × galleana include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
